ul.li:
Ordering Invariants:
queries follows the input query sequence.
results must be sorted by distance ASC (for L2) or DESC (for Cosine).
Compliance: Required for Recall@K evaluation pipelines.

Per Query (Estimate):
$D \times 12$ bytes (Vector Data)
$K \times 48$ bytes (Neighbor Metadata)

Example (D=768, K=10):
Approx 8.1 KB per query entry
1M queries = ~8.1 GB Storage

div.h1: VECTOR DB: GROUND TRUTH EXPORT FORMAT (JSON)
